clauses.text: Payment due upon delivery of goods.
Vendor warrants goods are free from defects for 90 days.

compliance_issues.issue: Missing provisions for inspection and acceptance of goods

redlining_suggestions.original_text: Vendor warrants goods are free from defects for 90 days.
redlining_suggestions.suggested_text: Vendor warrants goods are free from defects in materials and workmanship for 90 days from delivery. Warranty excludes damage from misuse or normal wear.
redlining_suggestions.rationale: Clarifies scope of warranty and adds reasonable exclusions
